pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 25: ROOM_URL="${JITSI_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:8080}/MathTutoringSession". Room is dynamically created in real Jitsi Meet instance at http://localhost:8080
Task description and verifier.py. This is the display name the user should enter when joining the meeting. Verifier checks for this name in final screenshot.

pi_items.verified_value: Mirror video (exact UI label unconfirmed; may be 'Mirror my video' or 'Mirror local video')
pi_items.source: Verifier.py expects 'Mirror local video' or 'Mirror self view'. GitHub issue #13421 references 'Mirror my video button'. Jitsi Meet configuration docs reference disableLocalVideoFlip and doNotFlipLocalVideo properties. Exact UI label in Settings > Video tab for version 9753 not definitively found in public documentation.
Task description: 'disable (uncheck) the Mirror local video option'. Verifier.py checks if 'mirror_unchecked' is true in final screenshot.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Jitsi Meet version 9753 running on http://localhost:8080. The meeting room 'MathTutoringSession' is created dynamically when users access the URL. Users are expected to join with display name 'Tutor Alex'. The task requires disabling a video mirroring setting in the Settings > Video tab, though the exact UI label for this setting could not be independently verified from public documentation (metadata claims 'Mirror local video', but GitHub references suggest it may be 'Mirror my video' or similar).
